content.text:
{
  "dimension": "intervention-quality",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "Nearly every coach move is matched precisely to what was just noticed and arrives at a moment the client can receive it. The opening 'How about right now?' inverts the future-frame the instant it appears. When the client signals 'we got to hold off on the insights,' the coach meets resistance with a single 'Okay' rather than defending — a textbook calibration of threshold. When pain emerges, the coach pauses to offer 'I'm sorry' without trying to coach it, then re-enters via the live sadness rather than the story. The shame sequence (28 → 30 → 32 → 34 → 36) builds in correct order: surface the belief, test the projection, locate it in self, then run the enjoy/not-enjoy diagnostic pair, then frame it as an experiment in turn 40. Moves are AoA-specific (frame-as-experiment, calibrate-threshold, treat-client-as-actor-of-emotion, follow-wonder-flag-the-deflection in turn 8) rather than generic. Timing follows feeling-before-action throughout; the coach holds silence and lets moves land.",
  "evidence_turns": [4, 8, 14, 16, 22, 24, 26, 30, 34, 36, 40],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Instant inversion of the future-frame — move precisely matches the read that 'postponing' is the concern."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the said vs the shown (smile vs confused head) — flag-the-deflection move at the right moment."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Meets resistance with 'Okay.' Calibrates threshold rather than pushing — high-skill restraint."},
    {"turn": 16, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Signature reframe: can the rush itself be enjoyed? Matches the read perfectly."},
    {"turn": 22, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Stops coaching to receive the pain. Correct pacing — does not reframe or fix."},
    {"turn": 24, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Returns to the work via the live feeling (sadness) with the 'enjoy the X' move; notices body and names it."},
    {"turn": 26, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Affirms victim-status the client is resisting — does not collude with the resistance. Right move, right moment."},
    {"turn": 30, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Long disclosure used as projection-flip; lands because rapport and feeling have been earned."},
    {"turn": 34, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'How would you enjoy your shame?' — applied AT the felt shame, not abstractly."},
    {"turn": 36, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Inversion pair makes the resistance mechanism visible — signature diagnostic sequencing."},
    {"turn": 40, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Frame-it-as-an-experiment: client tests both directions and finds out, rather than being prescribed."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["frame-it-as-an-experiment", "follow-wonder-flag-the-deflection", "calibrate-the-threshold", "treat-yourself-as-actor-of-emotion", "are-you-bracing-or-embracing", "how-is-that-not-here-right-now"],
  "expected_territory_misses": [],
  "notes": "Move-to-read matching is consistently high; the 'Okay' in turn 14 is the strongest single signal of timing skill."
}
